synthesized text:

Let $P(t)$ denote the population of organisms at time $t$ (in days). The logistic growth model is given by the differential equation

\[
\frac{dP}{dt} = rP\left(1-\frac{P}{K}\right),
\]
where $r>0$ is the per-capita growth rate and $K>0$ is the carrying capacity of the environment.

1. Determine the value of $r$.
